since_last: 75% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.16%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 75% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC -0.32% · Gold -0.62% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 75% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.16%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.16%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -24.57%
cards.body: Leaders: LRCX +8.56%, INTC +8.21%, AMAT +6.93%, ASML +6.91%, KLAC +6.61%. Laggards: IBM -24.57%, ISRG -5.95%, ADBE -3.78%, SAP -3.54%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.08% at $137.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.08% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
